answer:
<think> The question asks for the name of the director who worked on both "The Secret of NIMH" and "All Dogs Go to Heaven". I need to identify this person using the information I already have. I know that "The Secret of NIMH" was directed by Don Bluth and Gary Goldman, and "All Dogs Go to Heaven" was directed by Don Bluth. Therefore, Don Bluth is the common director for both films. </think>

<answer> \boxed{Don Bluth}
